# Event Meta

A comprehensive metadata component for displaying event information from Localist, including dates, times, location, and registration options.

## Interactive Preview

<Canvas of={MetaStories.Event} />
<Controls of={MetaStories.Event} />

## When to use it

Use Event Meta on event detail pages and calendar entries sourced from Localist. The component handles all Localist event shapes: single-date, multi-date, virtual, and in-person.

## Date Scenarios

The **Data Variant** control switches between four date configurations that mirror what Localist sends:

- **Mixed (Past & Upcoming)** — recurring event with some past and some upcoming occurrences
- **Upcoming Only** — all occurrences are in the future
- **Past Only** — all occurrences are in the past
- **Single Date** — one-off event with a single date

## All-Day Events

Toggle **All Day** in the controls to simulate events where Drupal sets start to 00:00 and end to 23:59. Event Meta detects this range and displays "All day" text in place of specific times, removing the small-caps time formatting.

## Technical Specifications

- **Atomic Level**: Molecule
- **Template**: `yds-event-meta-localist.twig`
- **Styles**: `_yds-event-meta.scss`
- **JavaScript**: `event-meta-localist.js` handles date parsing and all-day detection

### Accessibility

- ARIA labels on calendar and registration buttons
- Screen reader friendly date/time formatting
- Timezone-aware date display
- Proper heading hierarchy within the event detail layout

## Related Components

- **Date Time**: Atom used for date and time display
- **Image**: Optional event image rendered within the meta block
